mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.status, c.created_at, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM forum_comments c LEFT JOIN profiles u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted = 0 AND (c.status = 'approved' OR c.status IS NULL) ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
